title: Meteorological and snowpack observations from the Jeff Dozier Snow Study Site [formerly the CRREL/UCSB Energy Site (CUES)] on Mammoth Mountain, CA, USA: 1 January 2015 – 30 June 2025
author: Chasteen, Manda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Overview 
 This is a post-processed dataset of select measurements from the  Jeff Dozier Snow Study Site — formerly the CRREL/UCSB Energy Site (CUES)— on Mammoth Mountain, California, USA ( https://snow.ucsb.edu/ ) over the 1 January 2015 – 30 June 2025 period. 
 
  Coordinates:  37.6431°N, 119.0291°W [ map ] 
  Elevation:  2936 m (9633 ft) 
 
 Processing of this dataset was conducted by Manda Chasteen, Leidos Inc., in 2025 as part of work supported by  U.S. Army Cold Regions Research and Engineering Laboratory  award W913E523C0002. The raw uncleaned data—and other observations from this same period that were not included herein—can be downloaded from  https://snow.ucsb.edu/ .  
  DoD Distribution Statement A.  Approved for public release: distribution is unlimited. 
 _____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 
 File Descriptions 
  See README for more information  
 1-min data: 
  CUES_1min_data_atmos_radiation_soiltemp_precip_2015to2025.nc:  netCDF file containing 1-min observations of atmospheric variables, upwelling and downwelling radiation, soil temperature, and disdrometer precipitation measurements. 
  ncdump_CUES_1min_data_atmos_radiation_soiltemp_precip_2015to2025.txt:  text file summarizing the file contents via the output from  ncdump -h CUES_1min_data_atmos_radiation_soiltemp_precip_2015to2025.nc  
  Atmosphere:  
 
 air_temperature 
 air_temperature_data_flag 
 relative_humidity 
 relative_humidity_data_flag 
 station_pressure 
 station_pressure_data_flag 
 wind_speed 
 wind_direction 
 
  Radiation  :  
 
 surface_skin_temperature 
 surface_skin_temperature_data_flag 
 downwelling_longwave_platform 
 downwelling_longwave_platform_data_flag 
 downwelling_shortwave_platform 
 downwelling_shortwave_platform_data_flag 
 downwelling_shortwave_platform_instrument_flag 
 downwelling_shortwave_adj_boom 
 downwelling_shortwave_adj_boom_data_flag 
 upwelling_shortwave_fixed_boom 
 upwelling_shortwave_fixed_boom_data_flag 
 upwelling_shortwave_adj_boom 
 upwelling_shortwave_adj_boom_data_flag 
 
  Soil temperature:  
 
 soil_temperature_0cm_north 
 soil_temperature_10cm_north 
 soil_temperature_20cm_north 
 soil_temperature_30cm_north 
 soil_temperature_40cm_north 
 soil_temperature_50cm_north 
 soil_temperature_70cm_north 
 soil_temperature_70cm_north 
 soil_temperature_80cm_north 
 soil_temperature_90cm_north 
 soil_temperature_0cm_south 
 soil_temperature_10cm_south 
 soil_temperature_20cm_south 
 soil_temperature_30cm_south 
 soil_temperature_40cm_south 
 soil_temperature_50cm_south 
 soil_temperature_70cm_south 
 soil_temperature_70cm_south 
 soil_temperature_80cm_south 
 soil_temperature_90cm_south 
 soil_temperature_0cm_center 
 soil_temperature_10cm_center 
 soil_temperature_20cm_center 
 soil_temperature_30cm_center 
 soil_temperature_40cm_center 
 soil_temperature_50cm_center 
 soil_temperature_70cm_center 
 soil_temperature_70cm_center 
 soil_temperature_80cm_center 
 soil_temperature_90cm_center 
 
  Precipitation:  
 
 rainfall_rate 
 snowfall_swe_rate 
 accumulated_rain_1min 
 precipitation_type 
 precipitation_phase 
 number_of_hydrometeors 
 equivalent_radar_reflectivity 
 visibility 
 
 _____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 
 5-min data: 
  CUES_5min_data_snowdepth_swe_density_2015to2025.nc:  netCDF file containing 5-min observations of snow depth, snow water equivalent (SWE), and derived snow density. 
  ncdump_CUES_5min_data_snowdepth_swe_density_2015to2025.txt:  text file summarizing the file contents via the output from  ncdump -h CUES_5min_data_snowdepth_swe_density_2015to2025.nc  
  Snow depth:  
 
 snow_depth_wind_mast 
 snow_depth_wind_mast_data_flag 
 snow_depth_wind_mast_instrument_flag

 snow_depth_fixed_boom_instrument_flag 
 snow_depth_platform_south 
 snow_depth_platform_south_data_flag 
 snow_depth_platform_south_instrument_flag 
 snow_depth_remote_boom 
 snow_depth_remote_boom_data_flag 
 snow_depth_remote_boom_instrument_flag 
 snow_depth_remote_boom_density_calc 
 snow_depth_platform_north 
 snow_depth_platform_north_data_flag 
 snow_depth_platform_north_instrument_flag 
 snow_depth_platform_north_density_calc 
 
  SWE:  
 
 swe_dri_pillow 
 swe_dri_pillow_data_flag 
 swe_dwr_pillow 
 swe_dwr_pillow_data_flag 
 snowless_periods_dwr_pillow_flag 
 swe_dwr_pillow_density_calc 
 swe_ssg_pillows 
 swe_ssg_pillow_data_flag 
 snowless_periods_ssg_pillow_flag 
 swe_ssg_pillow_density_calc 
 
  Derived snow density:  
 
 snow_density_dwr_pillow 
 snow_density_ssg_pillow 
 
 _____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 
 15-min data: 
  CUES_15min_data_meltwater_soilmoisture_2015to2025.nc:  netCDF file containing 15-min observations of snow meltwater and soil moisture. 
  ncdump_CUES_15min_data_meltwater_soilmoisture_2015to2025.txt:  text file summarizing the file contents via the output from  ncdump -h CUES_15min_data_meltwater_soilmoisture_2015to2025.nc

  Soil moisture:

 soil_moisture_20cm_south

 _____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 
 Grouped data: 
  CUES_grouped_data_2015to2025.nc : consolidated netCDF file containing all prior observations, split into groups:  data_1_min ,  data_5_min ,  data_15_min . 
  ncdump_CUES_grouped_data_2015to2025.txt:  text file summarizing the file contents via the output from  ncdump -h CUES_grouped_data_2015to2025.nc
